How to Use FlexBeam to Help Relieve Anxiety If you haven’t already, read FlexBeam Applications and Usage and How to Use Your FlexBeam before proceeding. Being in a state of anxiety is detrimental to your health and general wellbeing. When you are stressed and anxious, your heart is racing and that, in turn, elevates anxiety further, draining your energy reserves. You should use FlexBeam daily to calm your body. It will help you relax and replenish your energy levels. We created two types of sessions that may help you with soothing down your anxiety. Session A and Session B. You can alternate between
these two sessions each day for optimal results. Something like this: Day 1
Session A Day 2
Session B Day 3
Session A Day 4
Session B and so on...
and so on... This is how these two sessions look like. Session A for Anxiety Relief Choose the DUAL (2) program and place your FlexBeam horizontally across your navel. After 10 minutes, place it vertically across your navel
again for another 10 minutes. For the last 10-minute application, switch to INFRA (3) and use FlexBeam on the upper part of your back, across
the neck and shoulders. Hi, need help? Hi, need help? Buy now
